items.headline: Why Netflix and Fox were both interested in Roku
items.summary: Semafor Business Reporter and Co-Host of Compound Interest Rohan Goswami joins Josh Lipton on Market Domination Overtime to discuss why streaming giants are interested in mergers with Roku (ROKU).
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Is Comcast (CMCSA) Turning In-Store AR Promotions Into a Last-Mile Advantage for Home Connectivity?
items.summary: Earlier this month, Comcast’s NBCUniversal marked the global theatrical release of Illumination’s Minions & Monsters by turning more than 700 Xfinity retail stores into augmented-reality “Minions & Monsters” destinations offering exclusive perks, collectibles, and special screenings for members while showcasing Xfinity Same-Day WiFi. This campaign uniquely blends Comcast’s film IP with an in-store AR experience to promote its new same-day home Wi-Fi setup, tying entertainment engagement...
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Plans £6 Billion UK Resort And Rolls Out Same Day WiFi
items.summary: Comcast plans to invest over £6 billion in its first European Universal resort in the UK. The company is rolling out Xfinity Same-Day WiFi with equipment delivery and in-store pickup for new US customers. NBCUniversal is launching a nationwide "Minions & Monsters" Augmented Reality experience across Xfinity retail stores tied to Illumination content. Comcast (NasdaqGS:CMCSA) is pairing a large UK theme park commitment with new US broadband and retail initiatives, giving investors fresh...

items.headline: CMCSA Stock Slumps To Nearly 13-Year Low: Retail Touts ‘Lifetime Opportunity To Get Rich’
items.summary: On Stocktwits, retail sentiment around Comcast improved from ‘neutral’ to ‘bullish’ territory over the past 24 hours, and message volume spiked about 268% in the same time.

items.headline: How Hackers Found a Back Door Into the American Living Room
items.summary: Nation-state cyberattackers are increasingly using residential proxy networks to mask their traffic, turning everyday electronics into a massive global threat.
